promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived export-pack reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the map-over-sources posture, two-doc center of gravity, preserved thin-canon cautions, path/export wayfinding value, and named stub pointers.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Episode 01 and the working-context bridge were used because they are the map's two substantive centers of gravity, and the export-pack batch was used because the map preserves pointer-side wayfinding into the same archived cluster.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this smaller adjacent memory-topology map was reduced into compact reusable wayfinding packets.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived structural-memory-map parent batch plus the Episode 01, working-context, and export-pack A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable topology, backreference, warning-preservation, and stub-pointer packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_STRUCTURAL_MAP_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the source as archive-side wayfinding without letting its compressed bullets outrank the underlying docs.

candidate_items.name: TWO_DOC_CENTER_OF_GRAVITY_WAYFINDING_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the map's clearest topology signal: most substantive wayfinding value flows through the Episode 01 and working-context families.

candidate_items.name: MAP_REQUIRES_SOURCE_BACKREFERENCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest guard against source substitution while keeping the map's fast structural recall value.

candidate_items.name: THIN_CANON_CAUTION_PRESERVED_INSIDE_SUMMARY_LAYER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest evidence that the summary layer was trying to keep authority gaps visible rather than smooth them away.

candidate_items.name: ARTIFACT_PATH_AND_EXPORT_POINTER_WAYFINDING_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the map's clearest non-doctrinal navigation value beyond the two thick docs.

candidate_items.name: NAMED_STUB_POINTERS_WITHOUT_CONTENT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the stub entries as archive pointers while explicitly blocking content invention.

quarantined_items.name: COMPRESSED_BULLETS_AS_BETTER_AUTHORITY_THAN_SOURCE_DOCS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The map is a compression layer over the archived docs, not stronger authority than them.

quarantined_items.name: STUBBED_MIGRATION_AND_CONVERSATION_DOCS_AS_IF_CONTENT_WERE_PRESENT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The map names these docs but does not supply their contents.

quarantined_items.name: ARCHIVED_MAP_TOPOLOGY_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_A2_SURFACE_LAYOUT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly marks this as a time-bounded archive topology rather than a current active-memory schema.

quarantined_items.name: WAYFINDING_PATH_LISTS_AS_CURRENT_ARTIFACT_INVENTORY_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The map's path and pointer lists are archive-side navigation cues, not current inventory truth by themselves.

quarantined_items.name: SUMMARY_LAYER_THIN_CANON_WARNINGS_AS_CANON_RESOLUTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Preserved warnings inside the map do not themselves settle the canon gap.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest topology and wayfinding packets in the parent batch: the two-doc center of gravity, source-backreference rule, warning preservation, artifact-path pointers, and stub-pointer discipline.
They preserve the map as archive-side navigation history without letting compressed bullets, stub names, or archived topology self-authorize into doctrine.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain source-substitution overreads, stub-content invention risks, current-layout overreads, or canon-resolution overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the Episode 01, working-context, and export-pack A2-mid batches as neighboring topology anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived structural-memory-map reduction pass.
